title: Track remaining coding-ritual setup (claude-rc install/verify)
description: Placeholder to verify cr- prefix after beads reinit. Real remaining work: install+verify claude-rc systemd sessions from an interactive WSL shell; verify the 4 project paths.
notes:
Scripts renamed to claudex-rc (Claude+Codex): scripts/claudex-rc.sh (manager) + scripts/setup-claudex-rc.sh (shim). Manages Claude (per-project claude-rc@

.service) + Codex (single codex-rc.service, Type=simple foreground 'codex remote-control', Restart=always; pick machine 'MVPBeast' in Codex app, no URL). INSTALL from interactive WSL (agent shell has no user DBus): /data/codes/coding-ritual/scripts/setup-claudex-rc.sh ; then ./scripts/claudex-rc.sh status ; ./scripts/claudex-rc.sh pair . All 4 default paths verified.
